conflicts.source_locator: Reports/models use n-hexane and cyclohexane naming in different cases.
conflicts.conflict: Reports/models use n-hexane and cyclohexane naming in different cases.
conflicts.technical_impact: Incorrect solvent identity changes thermodynamic parameters and recycle composition.
conflicts.decision: Resolve per case using component lists and property-method records.

conflicts.source_locator: Directory names mix 1,000 t/y and 2,000 t/y for the intermediate report.
conflicts.conflict: Directory names mix 1,000 t/y and 2,000 t/y for the intermediate report.
conflicts.technical_impact: Scale basis, stream normalization and acceptance criteria may be misapplied.
conflicts.decision: Create separate case IDs and obtain owner confirmation of intended capacity.

conflicts.source_locator: Contract requests multi-active-site parameter allocation; final report uses a single-site metallocene model.
conflicts.conflict: Contract requests multi-active-site parameter allocation; final report uses a single-site metallocene model.
conflicts.technical_impact: Model scope differs from contracted wording and affects identifiability/grade extrapolation.
conflicts.decision: Record formal deviation and validate single-site applicability; multi-site remains NOT_EVALUATED.

conflicts.source_locator: Pilot-scale recycle was not fully closed because convergence was difficult.
conflicts.conflict: Pilot-scale recycle was not fully closed because convergence was difficult.
conflicts.technical_impact: Reported steady case is not a validated closed-loop process; impurity memory is absent.
conflicts.decision: Keep HOLD until all recycle streams are connected and balances close.

conflicts.source_locator: A 200 kt/y dynamic-model claim lacks a matching dynamic report or .dynf asset in the audited corpus.
conflicts.conflict: A 200 kt/y dynamic-model claim lacks a matching dynamic report or .dynf asset in the audited corpus.
conflicts.technical_impact: Dynamic operability and control claims cannot be reproduced.
conflicts.decision: Require matching asset identity and dynamic validation report.

conflicts.source_locator: Temporary lock, zero-byte generated files, histories, snapshots and backups coexist with canonical deliverables.
conflicts.conflict: Temporary lock, zero-byte generated files, histories, snapshots and backups coexist with canonical deliverables.
conflicts.decision: Registry isolates noncanonical assets; canonical restoration set still requires owner approval.

conflicts.source_locator: Two polypropylene cable-screening contracts are unrelated to the POE acceptance scope.
conflicts.conflict: Two polypropylene cable-screening contracts are unrelated to the POE acceptance scope.
conflicts.technical_impact: Unrelated evidence could contaminate claim traceability.
conflicts.decision: Classify as UNRELATED and exclude from POE evidence and fixtures.
